name: Md Raihan
title: Full-stack Engineer · Founder & CTO
summary: Full-stack engineer and Founder & CTO of Graphland, where I've launched multiple SaaS products — owning architecture, infrastructure, and engineering hiring from first commit to production. Deep expertise across the TypeScript/Node.js and Python ecosystems, with a focus on scalable API design (REST, GraphQL, gRPC), microservices, and real-time systems. Author of open-source libraries used in production by other teams.

education.degree: MSc in Computer Science and Engineering
BSc in Computer Science and Engineering

experience.stack: TypeScript, React, Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker
highlights: Founded and run a product company shipping in-house SaaS products and developer platforms alongside custom client projects.

DineBD (client) — lead system designer for a food-delivery chain's full infrastructure: customer, partner, and rider apps plus operations dashboards on a microservice architecture; led the engineering team through delivery.
Own architecture, infrastructure, and deployments across all products; designed the shared multi-tenant platform they run on.
Hired and mentor the engineering team; set code standards, review processes, and delivery practices.
Built scalable web applications using React, Flask, and PostgreSQL.
Collaborated with Google Earth Engine, Digifarm, and other providers to integrate maps, field data, and agricultural insights.
Developed RESTful APIs and real-time data pipelines.
Implemented authentication, geospatial features, and data visualization.

experience.stack: Angular, TypeScript, GraphQL, Socket.io, RxJS, NgRx
highlights: Built Angular applications with TypeScript, GraphQL, and Socket.io.
Implemented real-time features and optimized frontend performance.
Used RxJS and NgRx for state and data management.
Collaborated with backend and design teams for seamless UI/data flow.
Built a video-sharing platform enabling creators and viewers to earn redeemable points.
Developed frontend and backend using React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Implemented video upload/streaming, authentication, and point management.
Developed backend systems and contributed to frontend features for a bidding marketplace (Flippa-like).
Implemented auction management, user workflows, and payment handling using Django and PostgreSQL.
Planned and executed new features and optimized system performance for scalability.

products.name: Banik
products.description: ERP and point-of-sale for merchants — sales, inventory, payroll, reports, and payment reminders over WhatsApp/SMS.

products.name: StoreOS
products.description: Multi-tenant commerce backend with REST/GraphQL APIs, a TypeScript storefront SDK, and CDN-backed media.

products.name: Identety
products.description: Self-hosted identity service with no MAU limits — Docker-ready, full source access, developer-friendly auth flows.

products.name: waland
products.description: WhatsApp/SMS API for Bangladesh — bulk campaigns, OTP delivery, templates, delivery reports, and webhooks.

products.name: envland
products.description: Encrypted .env manager for teams — CLI pull/push/diff across environments with AES-256-GCM encryption and audit history.

products.name: TechDiary
products.description: Bengali-language developer blogging platform (dev.to-style) — articles, gists, topics, and an active Discord community.

openSource.description: Merchant SDK for the Graphland Payment Gateway — invoice creation, payment status checks, and webhook signature verification.

openSource.name: Inline Switch
openSource.description: Flexible inline switch statement with pattern matching for TypeScript/JavaScript.

openSource.name: Quick Crud
openSource.description: Lightweight wrapper library for Mongoose to simplify CRUD operations, sorting, joining, and pagination.

openSource.name: Ghost Finder
openSource.description: Simple SDK for performing full-text search in Ghost CMS with customizable API for UI integration.
